title: A Simple Communion Hymn
subtitle: For the breaking of the bread
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Bread of the world, in mercy broken,
Wine of the soul, in mercy shed;
By whom the words of life were spoken,
And in whose death our sins are dead.

[Verse 2]
Look on the heart by sorrow broken,
Look on the tears by sinners shed,
And be Thy feast to us the token
That by Thy grace our souls are fed.

[Chorus]
Take, eat, this is My body.
Take, drink, this is My blood.
Do this in remembrance of Me,
Until I come again.

[Verse 3]
Lord, in the breaking, You are with us.
Lord, in the pouring, You are near.
In every fragment, every silence,
Your love, Your grace, Your presence, here.
chords:
D        A        Bm       G
Bread of the world, in mercy broken
D        A        G         D
Wine of the soul, in mercy shed
D        A        Bm       G
By whom the words of life were spoken
D        A        G         D
And in whose death our sins are dead
reflection: Take, eat. This is the whole of the gospel, in two hands.
